web.login.secure_link_helper.text: Ka tukuna tētahi hononga haumaru ki tō pouaka īmēra.

web.auth.sso.signing_in.text: E ārahi ana ki te kaiwhakaahua tuakiri...

web.auth.sso.error.text: I hapa te takiuru SSO. Tēnā ngana anō.

web.login.errors.sso_failed.text: I hapa te whakaaetanga SSO. Tēnā ngana anō, whakamahia rānei te takiuru kupuhipa.

web.login.errors.token_missing.text: He noa te hononga whakaaetanga. Tēnā tono anō i tētahi hononga takiuru.

web.login.errors.token_expired.text: Kua pau tēnei hononga takiuru. Tēnā tono anō.

web.login.errors.token_invalid.text: He muhu tēnei hononga takiuru. Tēnā tono anō.

web.auth.verify.invalid_key.text: He muhu, he pau rānei te kī manatoko

web.auth.verify.expired_key.text: Kua pau tēnei hononga manatoko. Tēnā tono anō.

web.auth.verify.already_verified.text: Kua manatokohia kē tēnei pūkete. Ka taea tō takiuru ināianei.

web.auth.verify.unable_to_verify.text: Kāore e taea te manatoko pūkete. Tēnā ngana anō, whakapā rānei ki te tautoko.

web.auth.verify.check_email.text: Tēnā tirohia tō īmēra mō tētahi hononga manatoko

web.auth.verify.error.text: I hapa te manatoko pūkete. Tēnā tirohia tō hononga manatoko, tono anō rānei.

web.auth.verify.what_to_do.text: He aha tāku e mahi ai?

web.auth.verify.check_email_help.text: Tirohia tō īmēra mō te hononga manatoko hou rawa atu

web.auth.verify.check_spam.text: Tirohia tō kōpaki imepora ki te kore e kitea ana te īmēra

web.auth.verify.contact_support.text: Whakapā ki te tautoko ki te haere tonu ōu raruraru

web.auth.verify.missing_key_title.text: E Hiahiatia Ana te Hononga Manatoko

web.auth.verify.missing_key_message.text: Whakamahia te hononga manatoko i tukuna ki tō wāhitau īmēra hei manatoko i tō pūkete.

web.auth.change_password.error.text: I hapa te hurihanga kupuhipa. Tēnā manatoko tō kupuhipa ināianei, ā, ngana anō.

web.auth.close_account.warning.text: Kāore e taea te hurihia tēnei mahi. Ka mukua mō ake tonu ōu karere huna katoa.

web.auth.close_account.confirm.text: E mārama ana ahau he mau tonu tēnei mahi

web.auth.close_account.button.text: Katua Mō Ake Tonu te Pūkete

web.auth.password_reset_request.descript.text: Tāurutia tō wāhitau īmēra i raro nei, ā, ka tukuna e mātou tētahi hononga hei tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa

web.auth.password_reset.title.context: Password reset request flow - user requests a reset link

web.auth.password_reset.description.text: Tāurutia tō kupuhipa hōu i raro nei. Me mōhio he kaha, he motuhake hoki hei tiaki i tō pūkete.

web.auth.passwordReset.emailSent.text: Kua tukuna tētahi īmēra ki a koe me tētahi hononga hei tautuhi anō i te kupuhipa o tō pūkete

web.help.magic_link_not_arriving.text: Kāore te hononga makutu i tae mai?

web.help.check_email_spelling.text: Manatokohia i tāurutia tika tō wāhitau īmēra

web.help.wait_few_minutes.text: Tataria ētahi meneti - ka āhua tōmuri ētahi wā ngā īmēra

web.help.try_again.text: Ngana ki te tono anō i tētahi hononga hōu ki te neke atu i ngā meneti 10

web.help.use_magic_link_instead.text: Whakamahia te kōwhiringa Hononga Makutu hei takiuru kāore he kupuhipa. Ka takiuru ana, ka taea te huri kupuhipa i Tautuhinga Pūkete.

web.help.account_locked_explanation.text: I muri i ngā tōanga takiuru hē maha, ka rakaina āmuri ngā pūkete mō te haumaru. Tataria 15 meneti, ā, ngana anō, whakamahia rānei te Hononga Makutu hei takiuru.

web.help.contact_us_description.text: Ki te haere tonu ōu raruraru, kei konei mātou ki te āwhina. Tukuna he karere ki a mātou, ā, ka whakahoki mātou ki a koe ōu tūāhuatanga.

web.auth.verify._guidance.context.text: Rerenga manatoko īmēra i muri i te rēhita

web.login.custom_domain_sso_title.text: Ko te hainatanga kotahi e waatea ana mō tēnei rohe

web.login.custom_domain_sso_description.text: Ka taea e te kaiwhakahaere rōpū te whakahohea i SSO hei tūhonohia ngā mema rōpū ki te takiuru ki konei. Whakapā ki te kaiwhakahaere mō te urunga.
